title: The home lives of the other characters
display_title: The home lives of the other characters
wikitext:
[]: The home lives of the other characters?             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Mon Sep 19, 2011 2:53 pm I think Gendo lives in his office. The reason it's always dark is because when you turn the lights on, his desk goes into the floor, a bed falls out of the wall, and another wall spins around revealing a kitchen/eating area. Also his closet. Full of identical clothes. He spends his time playing with Angel action figures pretending he's the hero of the whole thing. He also has a Rei action figure. He sleeps with it. I picture Fuyutsuki as living in his car. So, he does everything in his car. Everything Shigeru Aoba probably just plays guitar at home. His bed is covered in guitar magazines and his house looks messy, but he knows where everything is.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Sep 19, 2011 3:57 pm [URL=http://imageshack.us/photo/my-images/823/thesecretlifeofgendoika.jpg/] [/URL] relevant

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Sep 19, 2011 4:18 pm He lives in the basement of Akio Ohtori's cocktower and injects pharmaceuticals into his tearducts

[]:             Quote Post by arkiel » Mon Sep 19, 2011 4:23 pm The only time Gendo Ikari sleeps is post-coitus. I'm sure Ritsuko has a nice bed. Or maybe they just do it in a random barracks cell.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Mon Sep 19, 2011 4:27 pm Maya has an entire closest dedicated as a shrine to her beloved sempai, Fuyutsuki is a workaholic so he just sleeps in his office, Aoba usually gets so drunk after work that he can't find his way home so he sleeps in the alleyways, and Hyuga has a huge computer that takes up half his living room which is where he spends all his time.

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Mon Sep 19, 2011 4:37 pm Xard wrote: [URL=http://imageshack.us/photo/my-images/823/thesecretlifeofgendoika.jpg/] [/URL] relevant

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Mon Sep 19, 2011 5:01 pm Azathoth wrote: He lives in the basement of Akio Ohtori's cocktower and injects pharmaceuticals into his tearducts

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Sep 19, 2011 5:02 pm Aiko Heiwa wrote: gendo never takes off his glasses

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Mon Sep 19, 2011 5:07 pm i declare that episode to be non-canon also i mean his cool pimp glasses those are not cool pimp glasses they're NERD GLASSES

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Mon Sep 19, 2011 5:14 pm [quote=" Xard":1itj3ma3][/quote:1itj3ma3] Sadly, I could see the penultimate panel happening. I don't know why, but I've always thought of Touji's father as an abusive alcoholic.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Sep 19, 2011 6:20 pm CJD wrote: At first I thought it was a hilarious typo, but then I found out that character's from Utena and now I'm not sure.

[]:             Quote Post by mastervampire » Mon Sep 19, 2011 8:01 pm Didnt we breifly see Gendos home in the first episode when Shinji went there but choose not to stay?

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Mon Sep 19, 2011 9:19 pm ^no.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Sep 20, 2011 6:44 am Hyuga in turn has a Misato shrine in his apartment, complete with a collection of different clothing he stole. Why do you think he was so willing to do her laundry?

[]:             Quote Post by Viking » Tue Sep 20, 2011 7:52 am There's an episode of Petit EVA@School in which Gendo has a self-propelled desk actually. Bye

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Tue Sep 20, 2011 2:55 pm Viking wrote: There's an episode of Petit EVA@School in which Gendo has a self-propelled desk actually.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Tue Sep 20, 2011 3:04 pm I could imagine Hyuga living in the apartment building across from Shinji’s and Misato’s building. He would also have a telescope to peer into Misato’s room. Hyuga=Stalker

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Tue Sep 20, 2011 3:39 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: Hyuga in turn has a Misato shrine in his apartment, complete with a collection of different clothing he stole. Why do you think he was so willing to do her laundry?

[]:             Quote Post by SaVaGe » Tue Sep 20, 2011 4:38 pm I bet when she's alone, Ibuki's a real freak

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Thu Sep 22, 2011 4:26 pm It seems like Aoba is the only normal bridge bunny, albeit being the Japanese equivalent of a hipster. I don't know. He just came across as kind of hipster-ish to me. I mean, what kind of government official brings a freaking acoustic guitar to work?
